html:
KENYA RED CROSS SOCIETY

Internship Offer Letter

Offer Number {{ doc.name }}
Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date) }}
Applicant {{ doc.applicant_name }}
Department {{ doc.department }}
Supervisor {{ doc.supervisor }}
Start Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.start_date) }}
End Date {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.end_date) }}
Duration {{ doc.duration }}

Offer

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }}, Congratulations! Following your successful interview, we are pleased to offer you an internship position with the Kenya Red Cross Society. You are expected to report on the internship start date shown above.

Terms and Conditions

  • Observe Kenya Red Cross Society policies.
  • Maintain confidentiality.
  • Report to your assigned supervisor.
  • Adhere to working hours.
  • Complete assigned tasks professionally.
__________________________ HR Officer


__________________________ Organization Stamp
Kenya Red Cross Society
name: Internship Offer Letter
